title: neotorularia ledebourii
intro: Neotorularia ledebourii, also known as Chinese burnet or ledbour's burnet, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Neotorularia ledebourii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Neotorularia ledebourii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
